analytical_depth.rationale: Masterful deconstruction of the zero-promoter structure and its implications for insider signals and free float.

logical_consistency.rationale: Flawless reconciliation of conflicting timeframes (macro vs micro FII flows) in a dedicated section.

completeness.rationale: Covers all bases for ownership and explicitly addresses mandatory metrics, though ESOP quantification is missing due to data limits.

actionability.rationale: Highly actionable medium-term bullish thesis based on institutional handoff, though lacks specific technical entry levels.

sector_framework.rationale: Perfectly applies the new-age tech platform framework, specifically highlighting ESOP overhang and the growth-to-profitability rotation.

data_sourcing.rationale: Rigorous citation and explicit handling of the HISTORICAL_MCAP_MISMATCH caveat, though FII active/passive split is missing due to tool limits.

tool_use_discipline.rationale: Used all necessary tools and surfaced gaps honestly, but made 10 separate `calculate` calls sequentially (Turns 20-26, 30-32) instead of minimizing tool trips.

cost_efficiency.rationale: 35 turns and $0.74 cost is highly inefficient, falling into the F category (>20 turns) despite a 60.8% cache hit rate.

issues.issue: Agent took 35 turns, largely due to calling the `calculate` tool 10 separate times sequentially for simple math.
issues.suggestion: Instruct the agent to batch calculations or minimize sequential `calculate` tool calls to reduce turns and latency.

issues.issue: `shareholder_detail` does not return individual FII holder names, only domestic institutions, preventing active vs passive FII analysis.
issues.suggestion: Enhance the `get_ownership` data pipeline to include major foreign institutional investors (FPI/FII) in the top 20 shareholders list.

strengths: Exceptional analysis of the zero-promoter structure and its structural implications for the stock.
Excellent cross-section reconciliation that resolves apparent contradictions between macro delivery drops and micro institutional accumulation.
insurance.summary: This is an institutionally rigorous report with outstanding analytical depth regarding the FII-to-DII handoff and zero-promoter dynamics. However, the overall grade is heavily penalized by highly inefficient tool execution (35 turns) driven by sequential, unbatched calculator calls.
